productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Unisex Purple Digital Watch
description: Style NoteCheck out Q& Q's latest collection of watches for kids. Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by Q& Q! Now let your little one flaunt his/her timely bling with panache.  Product DetailsCase style: Digital watch with a purple plastic square case  Strap style: Purple plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Day, date, alarm, stopwatch displayed on the dial and four screws to reset time and other multiple featuresWater resistantWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 25 mm  Case thickness: 5 mm
